title: Uhambo Lwamagugu Ngezifundazwe ZaseNingizimu Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Uhambo Lwamagugu Ngezifundazwe ZaseNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Masihambe sidabule zonke izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye sithole izindawo ezikhethekile, izindaba nezinkambiso ezingezethu sonke.

media.alt: Imephu enemibala eveza umugqa waseNingizimu Afrika enamachashazi amakela izindawo zamagugu ezweni lonke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yamukela abafundi uchaze umqondo 'wohambo lwamagugu' - uhambo lomcabango olumela ezindaweni ezikhethekile kulo lonke elaseNingizimu Afrika. Buza: ukhona owake wavakashela imnyuziyamu, isakhiwo esidala, isikhumbuzo noma indawo yemvelo? Uhambo lwamagugu luxhumanisa lezi zindawo ndawonye. Ekupheleni kwesifundo abafundi kufanele bakwazi ukubalula izindawo zamagugu ezifundazweni ezihlukene futhi bakwazi ukusho ukuthi kungani sizivikela.

slides.title: Liyini ifa lamagugu?
slides.lead: Amagugu yikho konke esikuzuza kwabadala ngesikhathi esidlule esifuna ukukugcina ngokwesikhathi esizayo.

blocks.text: **Amagugu** yizinto esizithola kubantu abaphila ngaphambi kwethu. Kungaba izinto esingazithinta, njengezakhiwo ezindala namathuluzi, nezinto esingakwazi ukuzithinta, njengezingoma, izindaba, izilimi namarisiphi. Amagugu asisiza sazi ukuthi singobani nokuthi sivelaphi.

items: **Amagugu emvelo** - izintaba ezikhethekile, imihume, imifula nezilwane.
**Amagugu esiko** - izakhiwo, izikhumbuzo, ubuciko nezinto ezindala.
**Amagugu aphilayo** - izilimi, umculo, imidanso, ukudla nemibungazo.

media.alt: Izimpawu ezintathu ezilula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala nesigubhu, ziveza izinhlobo ezintathu zamagugu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nikeza izibonelo ezicacile zohlobo ngalunye ukuze abafundi beBanga 5 bakwazi ukuzicabanga: imvelo (iTable Mountain), isiko (iUnion Buildings), okuphilayo (ukucula isicathamiya, ibraai yomndeni, ukuxoxa izinganekwane). Gcizelela ukuthi amagugu aphilayo aphila kubantu, hhayi esakhiweni. Mema abafundi babalule igugu elilodwa elivela emndenini wabo.

slides.title: Izindawo Zamagugu Omhlaba ZaseNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zezindawo zethu zikhethekile kakhulu kangangokuthi umhlaba wonke uyasiza ukuzinakekela.

blocks.text: **Indawo Yamagugu Omhlaba** (World Heritage Site) yindawo ekhethwa yinhlangano ebizwa ngokuthi **UNESCO** ngoba ibalulekile kubo bonke abantu emhlabeni, hhayi izwe elilodwa nje. INingizimu Afrika inezindawo ezingaba **ishumi** ezinjena, ezisakazeke ezifundazweni. Ohambeni lwethu sizovakashela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethelwa imvelo, njengezintaba zaseKapa neDrakensberg.
Ezinye zikhethelwa umlando, njengeMapungubwe neRobben Island.
Ukuba ohlwini kusho ukuthi indawo ivikelelwe izingane zesikhathi esizayo.

media.alt: Ibheji eyindilinga enombhalo womhlaba ngaphakathi, njengophawu lwamagugu omhlaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina incazelo ilula: iUNESCO yiqembu ku-United Nations elenza uhlu olukhethekile lwezindawo ezibaluleke kakhulu emhlabeni. Awudingi ukuthi abafundi bacoshe inombolo eqondile - iphuzu ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika icebile ngezindawo ezinjena. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise inani lamanje lezindawo zamagugu omhlaba ze-UNESCO zaseNingizimu Afrika (kwakuyishumi ngo-2023) ngaphambi kokuba isifundo siphume.

slides.title: Isitobhi esisodwa samagugu esifundazweni ngasinye
slides.lead: Izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye, izindawo eziyisishiyagalolunye ezidumile esizozivakashela ohambeni lwethu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - imihume enezinsalela ezindala kakhulu zabantu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - umbuso wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika nobhejane wegolide.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - ijele lapho uNelson Mandela ayeboshelwe khona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Izintaba zeDrakensberg - izinkulungwane zemidwebo yamaSan emadwaleni.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu naseMthatha - izindawo zobuntwana bukaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Amagugu amaSan nemidwebo yasendulo eqoshwe emadwaleni eKaroo eyomile.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Imizana yamaSotho neVredefort Dome eseduze.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, lapho kwatholakala khona ugebhezi lwekhanda lwengane yasendulo.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Izintaba zaseMakhonjwa eBarberton - amanye amadwala amadala kunawo wonke emhlabeni.

slides.notes: Lesi isilayidi sokubuka konke. Funda isifundazwe ngasinye nesitobhi saso ngokuzwakalayo, ukhombe cishe lapho sikhona emephwini yomcabango (noma imephu esodongeni uma unayo). Tshela abafundi ukuthi amaslayidi alandelayo azosondeza ezinye zalezi. Ungabuza umfundi ngamunye akhethe isitobhi afisa ukusivakashela kakhulu asho isizathu. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuthi izifundazwe-nezindawo zihambisana neklasi lakho; isifundazwe ngasinye sinezindawo eziningi zamagugu futhi othisha bangakhetha izibonelo zendawo.

slides.title: ICradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Iqembu lemihume eduze neGoli lapho ososayensi bathola khona ezinye zezinsalela ezindala kunazo zonke zomndeni wabantu emhlabeni.

blocks.text: Emihumeni **iSterkfontein Caves** ososayensi bembule **izinsalela** - amathambo aphenduka amatshe - abantu bakuqala abaphila iminyaka eyizigidi eminingi edlule. Okutholakele okudumile kubandakanya ugebhezi olubizwa ngokuthi 'Mrs Ples' nethambo eliphelele cishe elibizwa ngokuthi 'Little Foot'. Yingakho le ndawo ibizwa ngokuthi *Cradle of Humankind* (Umkhumbi Wesizukulwane Sabantu).

items: Umkhumbi yilapho ingane ilala khona - ngakho lena injengendawo yokuzalwa kwabantu.
Iyindawo yamagugu omhlaba ngoba ixoxa indaba yabo bonke abantu.
Namanje usengavakashela imihume nemnyuziyamu.

media.alt: Isithombe esisikwe phakathi somhume ongaphansi komhlaba onogebhezi lwekhanda oluyinsalela ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza kahle igama 'insalela': amathambo aphenduka kancane amatshe esikhathini eside kakhulu. ULittle Foot noMrs Ples benza isayensi ibonakale iyiqiniso kubafundi. Gcina umqondo wesikhathi esidala uthambile - 'kudala kakhulu, kudala kunalokho esingakucabanga'. Xhumanisa neslayidi 5. [SME] Izinsuku zenziwe lula ngamabomu; qinisekisa noma yiziphi izibalo uthisha akhetha ukuzengeza ngomlomo.

slides.title: Umbuso WaseMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kudala, egqumeni eliqhwakele phezulu enyakatho kude, kwakumi inhloko-dolobha yombuso wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika.

blocks.text: Cishe eminyakeni engu-700 kuya ku-800 edlule, **iMapungubwe** kwakuwumbuso omatasa lapho abantu babelima, begcina izinkomo behwebelana ngegolide nangezinyo lendlovu namazwe akude. Inkosi yayihlala phezu kwegquma elikhethekile. Ababhukuli bezinto zasendulo bathola ngokuhamba kwesikhathi izinto ezinhle zegolide lapho, kubandakanya **ubhejane wegolide** omncane.

items: Kukhombisa ukuthi imibuso emikhulu yase-Afrika yayikhona lapha kudala ngaphambi kokufika kwabelungu.
Ubhejane wegolide manje uwuphawu oludumile lomlando waseNingizimu Afrika.
IMapungubwe iyindawo yamagugu omhlaba emngceleni neZimbabwe neBotswana.

media.alt: Igquma eliqhwakele phezulu nesimo esincane sobhejane wegolide phambi kwalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi isilayidi silungisa inkolelo-ze evamile ngokukhombisa umbuso wase-Afrika onamandla nocebile owachuma kudala ngaphambi kwezikhathi zobukoloniya. Gcizelela ukuhweba (igolide nezinyo lendlovu okwakuhamba kude ngolwandle) nobhejane wegolide njengengcebo. Abafundi beBanga 6 bafunda ngeMapungubwe ngokujulile kamuva, ngakho utshala imbewu. Gcina izinsuku zibungiwe ('cishe iminyaka engu-700-800 edlule').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Isiqhingi esincane olwandle eduze neKapa esaba ijele elidumile - futhi saba uphawu lwenkululeko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka eminingi **iRobben Island** kwakuyijele. Ngesikhathi sobandlululo, abaholi ababelwela amalungelo alinganayo babeboshelwa lapha, kude nemindeni yabo. **UNelson Mandela** wachitha iminyaka eminingi eseseleni elincane esiqhingini ngaphambi kokuba akhululwe kamuva abe uMongameli wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika okhethwe ngentando yeningi.

items: Namuhla iyimnyuziyamu efundisa izivakashi ngomzabalazo wenkululeko.
Abanye abaholi bendlela yizibotshwa zangaphambili ezabelana ngezindaba zazo.
Isikhumbuza ukuba sazise inkululeko namalungelo esinawo namuhla.

media.alt: Isiqhingi esincane esinomkhanyisi olwandle, neTable Mountain ebonakala kude.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha udaba lobandlululo ngobunono nangokulula kubafundi beBanga 5: abanye abantu babephathwa ngendlela engenabulungiswa ngenxa yombala wesikhumba sabo, futhi abantu abanesibindi basebenza ukuguqula lokho. Beka iRobben Island njengendawo yosizi kanye nethemba. Xhumanisa neFreedom Day / Nelson Mandela uma abafundi bemazi. Gwema imininingwane eshaqisayo; gxila esibindini nasekubalulekeni kwenkululeko.

slides.title: Imidwebo Yasemadwaleni YaseDrakensberg
slides.lead: Phezulu ezintabeni zeDrakensberg kunezinkulungwane zemidwebo eyenziwa abantu bamaSan kudala.

blocks.text: I-**uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** yiyona sixhaka sezintaba eziphakeme kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Imihume nemikhandlu yamadwala ayo iqukethe izinkulungwane **zemidwebo emadwaleni** eyenziwa amaSan **ayezingela ebutha ukudla**. Babedweba abantu, izimpofu, nezinkolelo zabo besebenzisa upende wemvelo ovela emadwaleni, ezitshalweni nasezilwaneni.

items: Igama elithi uKhahlamba lisho 'umgoqo wemikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imidwebo ineminyaka engamakhulu ngisho neyizinkulungwane ubudala.
Iyindawo yamagugu omhlaba ngenxa yemvelo yayo nobuciko bayo basendulo.

media.alt: Udonga lomhume olunemidwebo yamaSan yempofu nomuntu ogijimayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yethula amaSan njengabantu bokuqala baseNingizimu Afrika kanye nabaculi nabaxoxi bezindaba abanamakhono. Chaza indlela upende owawenziwa ngayo ngezinto zemvelo (i-ochre, amalahle, amanzi ezitshalo, amafutha ezilwane). Impofu yayibaluleke kakhulu ezinkolelweni zamaSan. Phatha amagugu amaSan ngenhlonipho - lezi yizithombe ezingcwele emiphakathini eyinzalo. Xhumanisa nemidwebo eqoshiwe yaseNorthern Cape eslayidini esilandelayo.

slides.title: Kudabula iKaroo neFree State
slides.lead: Ezinye izitobhi ezintathu ohambeni lwethu - eEastern Cape, eNorthern Cape naseFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Amagquma aluhlaza lapho uNelson Mandela akhulela khona. Imnyuziyamu eMthatha ixoxa indaba yempilo yakhe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Igquma elimboze imidwebo yasendulo eqoshwe emadwaleni, elinakekelwa yimiphakathi yamaSan namaKhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Umuzi WamaSotho
blocks.text: Imnyuziyamu ephilayo lapho ungabona khona izindlu zesintu zamaSotho ezinezindonga ezipendwe kahle.

media.alt: Izigcawu ezintathu ezincane: amagquma agingqikayo, idwala eliqoshiwe, neqhugwana eliyindilinga elipendiwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lezi zitobhi ezintathu zandisa uhambo ezifundazweni eziningi nasezinhlotsheni eziningi zamagugu: indawo yokuzalwa komuntu (Eastern Cape), ubuciko basendulo (imidwebo eqoshwe yaseNorthern Cape, ebazwa edwaleni esikhundleni sokupendwa kulo), namagugu aphilayo emzini osebenzayo (Free State). Veza umehluko phakathi kwemidwebo yamadwala (KZN) nemidwebo eqoshwe emadwaleni (Northern Cape). [SME] Faka izindawo zendawo zaseEastern Cape noma Free State uma zifanele abafundi bakho kangcono.

slides.title: Amadwala asendulo nengane yasendulo
slides.lead: Izitobhi zethu zokugcina zezifundazwe ziya eNorth West naseMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ugebhezi lwekhanda oluyinsalela lwengane yasendulo, 'iTaung Child', latholakala lapha. Lasiza umhlaba ukuba ufunde ukuthi abantu baqala e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Izintaba zaseMakhonjwa ziqukethe amanye amadwala amadala kunawo wonke emhlabeni - cishe aneminyaka eyizigidi ezingu-3 500 - manje eyindawo yamagugu omhlaba.

blocks.heading: Ibhonasi - Gauteng
blocks.text: IFreedom Park neConstitution Hill enyakatho zikhumbula umzabalazo wamalungelo abantu nentando yeningi.

media.alt: Ugebhezi lwekhanda oluyinsalela olusencane eceleni kwezintaba zasendulo ezisezingezingeni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung ixhumanisa emuva nesihloko seCradle of Humankind - iNingizimu Afrika iphakathi endabeni yemvelaphi yabantu. IBarberton ikhombisa amagugu emvelo ohlobo oluhlukile: amadwala amadala kakhulu. Ikhadi lebhonasi likuvumela ukuba ukhulume ngezindawo zentando yeningi zaseGauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa unyaka wokutholakala kweTaung Child (1924) nobudala obubungiwe bamadwala (cishe iminyaka eyizigidi ezingu-3 500) uma uzicaphuna ngomlomo.

slides.title: Amagugu aphilayo noSuku Lwamagugu
slides.lead: Awakhona wonke amagugu ahlala athule emnyuziyamu - amanye awo aphila kulokho esikwenzayo nsuku zonke.

blocks.text: **Amagugu aphilayo** adluliselwa kusukela kogogo bekhulu kuya kubazali kuya ezinganeni. Abandakanya **izilimi zethu ezingu-11 ezisemthethweni**, izingoma nemidanso yethu, izindaba zethu, izingubo zethu nokudla esikuthandayo. Njalo ngomhla ka-**24 September** iNingizimu Afrika igubha **uSuku Lwamagugu**, lapho sihlonipha wonke amasiko ethu ahlukene.

items: Umculo nomdanso onjengesicathamiya, umgqashiyo (gumboot) namapiano.
Ukudla okunjengephalishi, ubhanyibhanyi (bunny chow), amakoeksisters, umngqusho nechakalaka.
Izindaba, izibongo nemidlalo eyabelwana emindenini.

media.alt: Amanothi omculo, isigubhu nepuleti lokudla okumela amagugu aphilayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lesi sibe isilayidi esibandakanya abafundi kakhulu. Cela abafundi babelane ngengoma, ukudla noma indaba evela emakhaya abo. Gcizelela ukuthi amagugu aphilayo angawabo bonke futhi ayaqhubeka eshintsha - amapiano angamagugu amasha akhiwa manje. Chaza uSuku Lwamagugu ngokulula: iholidi lomphakathi lokugubha wonke amasiko ethu ndawonye. Qinisa inhlonipho ngokwehlukana.

slides.title: Ukunakekela amagugu ethu
slides.lead: Amagugu angawethu sonke, ngakho sonke kufanele sisize ukuwavikela.

blocks.text: Uma izakhiwo ezindala ziwa, imidwebo yamadwala iklwejwa, noma izindaba zingaphinde zixoxwe futhi, lawo magugu alahleka unomphela. Yingakho sinemnyuziyamu, izikhumbuzo nemithetho evikela izindawo ezikhethekile. Kodwa abantu abavamile bayasiza futhi - ngokuvakasha, ukufunda nangokudlulisela lokho abakwaziyo.

items: Ungalokothi uthinte noma ulimaze imidwebo yamadwala noma izinto ezindala.
Vakashela imnyuziyamu nezindawo zamagugu ukuze ufunde izindaba zazo.
Lalela abadala udlulisele izindaba zabo kwabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezibambe kahle isakhiwo esincane nesihlahla, zikhombisa ukunakekela amagugu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yisa isifundo ekutheni 'pho-ke' - amagugu abuthakathaka futhi angalahleka. Xhumanisa amathiphu amathathu nesenzo sangempela ohambweni lwesikole. Qinisa inhlonipho yezindawo ezingcwele njengemidwebo yamadwala yamaSan. Ungabuza abafundi babalule into eyodwa abazoyenza ukuvikela amagugu. Lokhu kulungiselela imibuzo yokubukeza.

slides.title: Esikufundile ohambeni
slides.lead: Sidabule zonke izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye sahlangana namagugu emvelo, awesiko nawaphilayo.

blocks.text: Kusukela emihumeni **yeCradle of Humankind** kuya embusweni **waseMapungubwe**, ijele **laseRobben Island** nezintaba ezipendiwe **zaseDrakensberg**, amagugu aseNingizimu Afrika axoxa indaba yabo bonke abantu bayo. Amagugu angawabo bonke, futhi wonke umuntu angasiza ukuwavikela.

blocks.question: Bala izindawo zamagugu ezintathu ezihlukene usho ukuthi isindawo ngayinye ikusiphi isifundazwe.
Chaza umehluko phakathi kwamagugu emvelo, amagugu esiko namagugu aphilayo. Nikeza isibonelo esisodwa salinye.
Kungani kubalulekile ukunakekela amagugu ethu? Nikeza izizathu ezimbili.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula izindawo nezifundazwe; umbuzo 2 uhlola umqondo omkhulu wezinhlobo ezintathu zamagugu; umbuzo 3 uhlola ukuqonda ukuthi kungani amagugu ebalulekile. Ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela isitayela seCAPS Intermediate Phase. Vala ngokukhumbuza abafundi ukuthi nabo bayingxenye yamagugu aphilayo aseNingizimu Afrika.
